title: amauropelta patula
intro: Amauropelta patula, also known as the Patula Fern or Patula Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. The plant is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Amauropelta patula are attributed to its high levels of flavonoids and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and eczema, promoting overall respiratory and skin health.
